dateOptionId.description: The id of the date format to use when displaying dates to this user. These options are defined in Admin > Configuration.

displayName.description: The user’s name as displayed in the user interface.

duoTwoFactor.description: Whether Duo two-factor authentication is enabled.

emailAddress.description: The user's email address. Used by the system to send reports, access requests, and other notifications.

enabled.description: Whether the user account is enabled. Disabled users are unable to log in and do not consume a user license.

fido2TwoFactor.description: Whether FIDO2 two-factor authentication is enabled.

groupOwners.description: A list of group ids for the groups that can manage this user. If not set, the user is managed by all users with the ‘Administer Users’ role permission.

id.description: User ID. Must match ID in path.

isApplicationAccount.description: Whether this is an application account. Application accounts are used for automation, cannot log in using the UI, and do not consume a user license.

isGroupOwnerUpdate.description: Whether the user is managed by the groups specified in GroupOwners or is managed by all users with the ‘Administer Users’ role permission.

isLockedOut.description: Whether the user is locked out. A locked out user cannot log in.

loginFailures.description: Number of login failures to allow before the account is locked out. Set to 0 for unlimited login attempts.

oathTwoFactor.description: Whether OATH two-factor authentication is enabled.

password.description: The password used by local accounts to log in.

radiusTwoFactor.description: Whether RADIUS two-factor authentication is enabled.

radiusUserName.description: When a user account uses RADIUS two-factor authentication, this property is the user name of the RADIUS account used to authenticate this user.

timeOptionId.description: The id of the time format to use when displaying times to this user. These options are defined in Admin > Configuration.
